overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a gothic castle corridor with vaulted stone ceilings and tall windows. The player passes a student character, enters a dimly lit circular tower room with ornate furnishings and a domed ceiling, explores the space, and exits back to the main corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle corridor with tall arched windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the grand corridor, observing the stone architecture and house banners

entered.detail: high ornate stone ceiling with ribbed vaulting and decorative patterns
tall marble columns with carved capitals supporting the ceiling arches
tall marble columns with carved capitals supporting the ceiling arches
tall gothic windows with diamond-patterned leaded glass letting in bright light
polished wooden floor with intricate geometric inlay pattern
vertical banners in green and red hanging from the walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a grand gothic corridor with soaring vaulted ceilings and tall windows casting natural light onto the polished parquet floor. Stone columns line both sides of the walkway, and house banners hang from the walls. The camera moves steadily forward through this empty, majestic space.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor transition area with portrait paintings

events.description: entering the darker transitional corridor with artificial wall lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a student in dark robes, continuing toward the doorway at the end of the hall

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes leaning against the stone railing, looking out the window

entered.detail: collection of oil paintings in ornate gold frames depicting historical figures
gothic archway leading to a darker interior space

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the corridor, the camera passes a student character leaning against the railing on the left. The walls are now lined with framed portrait paintings in ornate frames. The lighting gradually shifts from natural to artificial as the camera approaches the arched stone doorway at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular tower room with domed ceiling and divination furnishings

events.description: entering the dimly lit circular room with ornate vaulted ceiling
camera pans upward to examine the detailed dome ceiling architecture

agents.ego_description: moving through the circular room, examining the divination furnishings, teacups, and looking up at the ornate ceiling

entered.detail: ornate white stone railing encircling the upper level of the tower room
intricately carved wooden dome ceiling with geometric patterns and hanging fixtures
warm glowing wall-mounted lanterns providing ambient lighting
warm glowing wall-mounted lanterns providing ambient lighting
large red and gold patterned rug covering the wooden floor
small table with teacups and saucers arranged for divination practice

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a circular tower room dramatically different from the corridor, featuring a domed wooden ceiling with intricate carvings and warm brass wall sconces. The space is furnished with divination equipment including teacups on small tables and ornate rugs on the wooden floor. The camera explores the room, panning upward to admire the detailed ceiling architecture before continuing around the circular balcony.

scene_state.functional_zone: return to the main gothic corridor

events.description: exiting the circular room back into the bright main corridor

agents.ego_description: walking out of the circular tower room and back into the sunlit main corridor

entered.detail: returning to the high stone vaulted ceiling of the main corridor
tall marble columns lining the corridor
tall marble columns lining the corridor
patterned wooden floor of the main corridor
tall windows bringing natural light back into view

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the dim circular room through the arched doorway, transitioning back to the bright, naturally lit main corridor. The geometric parquet floor and stone columns reappear as the camera returns to the grand gothic hallway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, majestic gothic corridor into a dimly lit circular tower room before returning to the grand hallway. It begins by gliding through a vaulted corridor where natural light spills across polished parquet floors and stone columns. As the camera moves forward, it passes a student leaning against a railing and moves past ornate portrait paintings, with the lighting gradually shifting from natural daylight to artificial warmth upon approaching an arched doorway. The scene then opens into a circular tower room featuring a carved wooden domed ceiling and divination equipment, where the camera pans upward to admire the architecture before circling the balcony. Finally, the camera exits the dim chamber through the archway, transitioning back into the bright, naturally lit expanse of the main gothic corridor.
